description: Perform a manual Davidson-MacKinnon J-test to compare two non-nested regression models using the 'food.gdt' dataset: Model A (food_exp = b0 + b1*income + u) and Model B (food_exp = a0 + a1*log(income) + v). Save the full output of the auxiliary regression used to test Model A (regressing food_exp on income and the fitted values from Model B) to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/aux_linear.txt. Save the full output of the auxiliary regression used to test Model B (regressing food_exp on log(income) and the fitted values from Model A) to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/aux_log.txt.
